title: Back Weapon Slot
description: This mod adds a Back Weapon slot with the help of Curios API
body:
![The title of the mod](https://i.imgur.com/EmB3NNJ.png)

**This mod adds a Back Weapon slot with the help of [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)**

- Quick swap is possible with V by default, can be changed in the key binds 
(The offhand like display can be moved and/or turned off trough the config)
